mapper.select: SELECT STATUS FROM T_BUS_TRUST where ID=#{trustId}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, QUANTITY, START_TIME workTime, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_ID, END_TIME workTimeEnd FROM T_PRD_CARGO_WATER where TRUST_ID=#{trustId}

SELECT ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, QUANTITY, START_TIME workTime, END_TIME workTimeEnd, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, TRUST_ID FROM T_PRD_CARGO_WATER where ID=#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_CARGO_WATER (ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, TRUST_ID, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, QUANTITY, START_TIME, END_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{processCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{workTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{workTimeEnd,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
